# url

**Instance Property**

The URL represented by the resource.

## Declaration

```swift
var url: URL { get }
```

## Accessing resource properties

- **isWritable**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the file system supports writing to the contents of the path URL.

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether the file system supports writing to the contents of the path URL.
